templates.name: Never force-push to main
templates.problem: Stops destructive history rewrites on protected branches before they land.
templates.roi: Protects every shared repo from the fastest irreversible mistake.
templates.rollout: Enable on every team repo on day one.

templates.name: Never skip tests before commit
templates.problem: Requires proof before code leaves the laptop, reducing broken commits and noisy CI.
templates.roi: Cuts review churn and CI rollback time across the team.
templates.rollout: Pair with repository-specific test commands.

templates.name: Require evidence before saying done
templates.problem: Prevents agents from claiming success without test, deploy, or runtime evidence.
templates.roi: Raises trust in autonomous runs and reduces manual re-checking.
templates.rollout: Use for every workflow where proof matters more than speed.

templates.name: Protect production SQL
templates.problem: Blocks destructive SQL operations against production-like targets.
templates.roi: One saved incident pays for the whole rollout.
templates.rollout: Turn on for any team touching live data.

templates.name: Back up .env before editing
templates.problem: Flags risky config edits before tokens or local credentials are lost.
templates.roi: Reduces secret churn and local breakage during setup work.
templates.rollout: Good default for every machine and shared repo.

templates.name: Promote known-good workflows
templates.problem: Turns repeated thumbs-up patterns into recommended workflow defaults and starter rules.
templates.roi: Helps new agents and new teammates start from what already works.
templates.rollout: Use with shared lessons to accelerate onboarding.

templates.name: Require diff impact before central edits
templates.problem: Blocks edits to high-centrality files unless the agent has inspected the dependency impact first.
templates.roi: Turns code-graph context into a concrete guardrail for the changes most likely to break many downstream paths.
templates.rollout: Enable after generating a code knowledge graph and tagging critical files or modules.

templates.name: Checkpoint cross-layer refactors
templates.problem: Requires an explicit checkpoint before an agent changes multiple architectural layers in one run.
templates.roi: Prevents broad refactors from becoming invisible blast-radius expansion.
templates.rollout: Use with graph layer labels from tools such as Understand Anything, code-graph MCPs, or internal architecture maps.

templates.name: Protect generated graph artifacts
templates.problem: Stops agents from editing generated knowledge-graph artifacts as if they were source of truth.
templates.roi: Keeps graph context reproducible and avoids corrupting the evidence layer agents rely on for impact analysis.
templates.rollout: Enable for repos that commit or cache graph outputs locally.

templates.name: Block package lifecycle secret harvest
templates.problem: Stops package lifecycle scripts from reading local credentials during npm, PyPI, Docker, or CLI compromise scenarios.
templates.roi: Turns developer-machine supply-chain awareness into a runtime stop before secrets are harvested at scale.
templates.rollout: Enable on every repo where agents can install packages, run package scripts, or edit dependency automation.

templates.name: Review untrusted CLI before execution
templates.problem: Blocks one-shot CLI execution paths that can turn a copied command into developer-machine compromise.
templates.roi: Prevents AI assistants from amplifying malicious copy-paste install flows across repos and machines.
templates.rollout: Allowlist trusted internal CLIs and require source review for every new external executable.

templates.name: Checkpoint dependency bot autofix
templates.pattern: (dependabot|renovate|npm audit fix|pnpm audit|pip install -U|docker pull|cargo update)
templates.problem: Requires a human-readable checkpoint before automated dependency updates expand the trusted code surface.
templates.roi: Keeps dependency bots and package managers from silently widening blast radius during a supply-chain incident.
templates.rollout: Start as warn mode for dependency PRs; promote to block for production services or privileged developer machines.

templates.name: Require credential exposure assessment
templates.problem: Forces an exposure assessment before an agent claims a supply-chain incident is resolved.
templates.roi: Connects prevention with remediation: what credential lived where, who touched it, and whether rotation is required.
templates.rollout: Use with incident-response runbooks and secrets scanner output from GitGuardian or internal tooling.

templates.name: Require section tree before multimodal answers
templates.problem: Blocks visual document answers when the agent has not preserved document hierarchy, section IDs, and source paths.
templates.roi: Prevents multimodal RAG demos from becoming ungrounded image guessing while keeping costs lower than full multimodal embeddings.
templates.rollout: Enable for PDF, report, support-doc, research-paper, and compliance workflows before agents answer with images.

templates.name: Require image pointer grounding
templates.problem: Requires every cited visual to carry a source document, parent section, and file path pointer.
templates.roi: Turns proxy-pointer RAG structure into an auditable answer boundary instead of trusting visual similarity.
templates.rollout: Start on any workflow that returns charts, figures, screenshots, or PDF images to users.

templates.name: Block cross-document image leakage
templates.problem: Stops agents from attaching a plausible visual from the wrong source document.
templates.roi: Protects trust in buyer-facing document answers where one wrong chart or figure can invalidate the whole system.
templates.rollout: Promote to block as soon as the ingestion pipeline records document IDs for image pointers.

templates.name: Checkpoint vision filter for visual claims
templates.problem: Requires an optional vision-model sanity check before high-impact answers rely on visual content.
templates.roi: Keeps the cheap text-pointer path fast while adding review only when the answer makes visual claims.
templates.rollout: Use warn mode for low-risk docs and block mode for legal, financial, medical, or customer-facing visual answers.

templates.name: Require RAG baseline before precision tuning
templates.problem: Blocks embedding, threshold, or precision tuning when the agent has not preserved a retrieval baseline and recall check.
templates.roi: Prevents a local precision improvement from silently degrading general retrieval quality across the agentic pipeline.
templates.rollout: Require baseline recall@k, precision@k, and answer-with-evidence metrics before changing retrieval thresholds or embedding models.

templates.name: Require two-stage RAG verifier for structural near misses
templates.problem: Requires a token-level verifier, reranker, or second-stage check when retrieval must distinguish structurally similar but meaningfully different evidence.
templates.roi: Catches the role-reversal and negation failures that vector similarity and keyword search can miss before downstream agents act.
templates.rollout: Enable for legal, finance, compliance, support, and autonomous-agent workflows where wrong retrieval can trigger real actions.

templates.name: Checkpoint RAG latency and precision tradeoff
templates.problem: Requires an explicit latency budget before adding verifier or reranker stages to precision-sensitive retrieval.
templates.roi: Keeps high-risk RAG workflows accurate without accidentally making production agents too slow or expensive to run.
templates.rollout: Start in warn mode; promote to block when latency regressions exceed the workflow SLA.

templates.name: Require director journal for long-running agent
templates.problem: Blocks long-running agent work when the system relies on raw chat history instead of a structured working-memory journal.
templates.roi: Prevents context-window bloat, compaction drift, and incoherent handoffs across hundreds of agent requests.
templates.rollout: Enable for background agents, multi-agent investigations, revenue loops, and any workflow expected to span more than one session.

templates.name: Require critic review for agent findings
templates.problem: Requires a critic pass with evidence inspection and credibility scoring before agent findings become shared truth.
templates.roi: Stops invented or misinterpreted findings from becoming the memory that future agents build on.
templates.rollout: Start with warn mode for summaries; promote to block for security, revenue, incident, and customer-facing findings.

templates.name: Checkpoint critic timeline conflict resolution
templates.problem: Requires duplicate removal and source-strength conflict resolution before a long-running agent updates its timeline.
templates.roi: Keeps long-lived agent memory coherent while preserving only the strongest evidence across rounds.
templates.rollout: Use in warn mode for internal loops and block mode when the timeline feeds irreversible actions or external replies.

templates.name: Require verifier before reasoning compression
templates.problem: Blocks reasoning-length compression when the workflow has not preserved verifier, accuracy, and rollback evidence.
templates.roi: Saves tokens only when compressed reasoning still passes quality checks instead of trading correctness for shorter traces.
templates.rollout: Enable for model-routing, benchmark, prompt-eval, and expensive agent workflows before shortening reasoning traces.

templates.name: Checkpoint low-confidence reasoning steps
templates.problem: Requires inspection before low-confidence steps in otherwise successful reasoning become reinforced training or routing signal.
templates.roi: Reduces brittle step-level learning where a correct final answer hides unstable intermediate reasoning.
templates.rollout: Start as warn mode for prompt and model evals; promote to block when those traces update routing or fine-tuning data.

templates.name: Checkpoint high-confidence failed rollout
templates.problem: Requires a verifier-error or truncation check before penalizing confident reasoning from failed rollouts.
templates.roi: Prevents training or routing updates from punishing correct reasoning when the failure came from truncation or verifier noise.
templates.rollout: Use for reasoning-compression experiments, evaluation harnesses, and DPO/RLHF export review.
